import numpy as np
import bisect
import statistics
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(data, value):
    if not data:
        return np.empty(0), 0

    average = statistics.mean(data)
    greater_than_avg = data[data > average]
    count_greater_than_value = len(greater_than_avg)

    sorted_data = np.sort(data)
    index = bisect.bisect_right(sorted_data, value)
    count_less_or_equal = index

    if index < len(data):
        count_greater_than_value += data.count(value) - count_less_or_equal

    # Plotting the histogram of sorted numbers
    plt.hist(sorted_data, bins=50)
    plt.title("Histogram of Sorted Numbers")
    plt.xlabel("Values")
    plt.ylabel("# of Occurrences")
    plt.grid()
    plt.show()

    return greater_than_avg, count_greater_than_value
